title: Indulgent Peppery Mediterranean Cheese Pizza
description: A rich, flavorful pizza featuring a peppery twist on classic Mediterranean ingredients. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella cheese
ingredients.notes: low-fat-friendly option: reduce to 6 oz or use part-skim mozzarella

instructions: Roll out the pizza dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Spread the tomato ketchup evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top with mozzarella and feta cheese.
Add the Kalamata olives on top of the cheese.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes before slicing and serving.
